potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall transition a plane from 'Arrival' to 'Preparation' upon its arrival.
The system shall assign a prepared plane to either 'Operations' or 'Maintenance' based on its condition and schedule.
The system shall transition a plane from 'Maintenance' to 'Preparation' after checking and servicing it until it is ready for operations.
The system shall take a plane out of service if it is no longer available for use.
The system shall remove a plane from its operations when it is permanently withdrawn from service.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: 'Once the plane arrives, it is prepared so that it can be used for flights.'
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall transition a plane from 'Arrival' to 'Preparation' upon its arrival.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: 'The system shall assign a prepared plane to either 'Operations' or 'Maintenance' based on its condition and schedule.'
hallucinations.reason: The original text does not mention the system assigning planes; it states that planes are assigned by operational decisions.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: 'The system shall keep a plane in the 'Operations' state if it still has scheduled flights.'
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is implied but not explicitly stated as such in the original text.
